comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Implemented: tracker_dir() routed through load_config (full precedence, env-verbatim fast path, ConfigError->default fallback); new tickets_branch() resolver (propagates ConfigError by design); reads.py duplicate unified to source the dir NAME from config while preserving its git work-tree validation gate + sys.exit. Subagent review: clean, no blockers — added the recommended comment on the tickets_branch/tracker_dir error-handling asymmetry. 548 tests pass (incl. the 3 malformed-config gate tests); ruff clean.

compiled_state.description:
## What
Introduce a single resolver `tickets_branch(root=None)` next to `tracker_dir()` in
`src/rebar/config.py`, and route BOTH through the resolved typed `Config` (full precedence)
rather than the env-only path `tracker_dir()` uses today (config.py:81-87). Unify the
duplicate `tracker_dir()` implementation in `src/rebar/_engine_support/reads.py:99-149`
so there is exactly one source of truth for each value.

- `tickets_branch()` returns `config.tracker.branch` (default `tickets`).
- `tracker_dir()` returns an absolute path from `config.tracker.dir`, still honoring the
  `REBAR_TRACKER_DIR` env override via the standard chain.
- Remove/redirect the `_engine_support/reads.py` copy to call the canonical resolver
  (or share one helper) so they cannot drift.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `tickets_branch(root=None)` added and returns the configured branch (default `tickets`).
- [ ] `tracker_dir()` reads resolved `Config`, not env-only; precedence honored.
- [ ] The duplicate resolver in `_engine_support/reads.py` is unified (single source).
- [ ] No behavior change at defaults (existing tests green).

## Files
- `src/rebar/config.py`
- `src/rebar/_engine_support/reads.py`

## Depends on
- Child 1 (TrackerConfig section must exist).

## Review refinements (plan-review gate)
- G6 (conf 0.86, critical): `_engine_support/reads.py`'s `tracker_dir()` (99-149) is NOT a
  pure path resolver — it performs a git work-tree validation gate
  (`git -C root rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree`) and related repo checks. Unification must
  PRESERVE that contract (keep the validation side or split path-resolution from validation
  explicitly); do not silently drop it.
- T4/E2: routing `tracker_dir()` from env-only to full precedence is a behavior change for
  existing callers — document it in docs/config.md (resolution order now applies).
- [ ] The reads.py work-tree validation behavior is preserved (or explicitly relocated), proven by a test.
- [ ] The env-only -> precedence resolution change for `tracker_dir()` is documented.
compiled_state.title: resolvers: add tickets_branch(); route tracker_dir() through resolved Config; unify duplicate
